About us

Anjo Cleaning delivers premium cleaning and dependable property care in Madeira — powered by German standards, clear routines, and genuine island commitment.

Where German precision meets Madeira

Anjo Cleaning is built on a personal journey: from Germany to Madeira — a place that quickly became home.

We bring what owners and hosts need most: reliability, punctuality, and an uncompromising eye for detail. Locally, we add hands-on experience and direct, transparent communication.

Our philosophy: the best of two worlds

  • German thoroughness: structured workflows, checklists, and consistent final inspections — for results you can see and feel.
  • Island care: respect for your property, furnishings, and surroundings — we treat every home as if it were our own.
  • True reliability: clear agreements, on-time delivery, fast feedback — so you stay in control at all times.

Why “Anjo”?

“Anjo” means angel — and that’s how we see our role: a calm, dependable hand in the background that keeps your property maintained, presentable, and guest-ready — whether it’s a holiday home, private residence, or office space.

“My love for Madeira drives me to make this island a little more beautiful — room by room, with precision and heart.”

Florian Engelmann, CEO

Your partner in Madeira — even from afar

Whether you live in Madeira or manage your property remotely, Anjo Cleaning is the partner that delivers premium quality, takes responsibility, and works with values you can trust.

Learn more about our Cleaning for Alojamento Local in Madeira and get in touch directly about your property in Madeira.

Anjo Cleaning Unipessoal Lda is a cleaning company based on Madeira — specialised in holiday rentals, Airbnb and Alojamento Local (AL). Our focus: reliable turnover cleaning, deep cleaning, and a consistently guest-ready presentation.

We use cookies to operate the website reliably and improve usage. You can accept or decline. Details are in the privacy policy. Privacy
